channel.title: aircraft.fyi
channel.description: Every aircraft, at true scale. Long-form aviation writing, sourced and dated.

item.title: Why the four-engine airliner is extinct
item.description: The 747, the A340 and the A380 were not beaten by a better aeroplane. They were beaten by a rule change, and by an engine that stopped breaking.

item.title: Is supersonic travel actually coming back?
item.description: Boom Supersonic has flown a demonstrator, built a factory and taken 130 orders. It still has not run its engine. Here is where the comeback really stands in mid-2026 — and how Overture measures up against Concorde.
